name: Amazon Prime Video
reliabilityNotes: Amazon Prime Video blocks many known VPN IP ranges but is generally less aggressive than Netflix. Content licensing varies significantly by region, and most premium VPNs work reliably.
troubleshootingTips: Connect to a VPN server in your desired region before loading Prime Video
Try different server locations if the current one is detected
Use a browser in incognito/private mode to avoid cached geolocation data
Disable IPv6 in your network settings to prevent IP leaks
Check that your VPN provider has servers optimized for streaming
